name: Lux

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Illumination
passive.description_source: Innate:  Lux's abilities apply a mark to enemies hit for a few seconds. Her basic attacks and  Final Spark consume the mark to deal bonus magic damage.

effects.description: Innate: Lux's abilities apply a mark to enemies hit for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits. Lux's basic attacks on-hit and Final Spark consume the mark to deal 30 : 220 (based on level) (+ 35% AP) bonus magic damage.

passive.description: Innate: Lux's abilities apply a mark to enemies hit for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits. Lux's basic attacks on-hit and Final Spark consume the mark to deal 30 : 220 (based on level) (+ 35% AP) bonus magic damage.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Starting an attack windup against a target with a mark that is about to expire refreshes its duration to 0.

basic_ability_1.name: Light Binding
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Lux shoots a sphere of light in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first two enemies hit and  roots them for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lux shoots a sphere of light in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first two enemies hit and roots them for 2 seconds.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Lux shoots a sphere of light in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first two enemies hit and roots them for 2 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Targets immune to the root still count towards Light Binding's two-target limit.

basic_ability_2.name: Prismatic Barrier
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Lux throws her wand in the target direction that homes back to her after reaching maximum range.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lux throws her wand in the target direction that homes back to her after reaching maximum range.
Active: Lux throws her wand in the target direction that homes back to her after reaching maximum range.

effects.description: Lux gains the shield upon throwing and upon retrieving the wand.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Lux throws her wand in the target direction that homes back to her after reaching maximum range. Allied champions hit by the wand gain a shield for 2.5 seconds, which can stack up to 2 times, stacking with the previous shield and refreshing its duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Each pass of the wand grants a shield to each target once.

basic_ability_3.name: Lucent Singularity
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Lux sends a lucent singularity to the target location that lasts for a few seconds and slows enemies within.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lux sends a lucent singularity to the target location, remaining there for 5 seconds to grant sight of the area and slow nearby enemies.

effects.description: Lucent Singularity can be recast at any time while it is in flight or within the duration, and does so automatically after the duration.

effects.context_notes: Recast: Lux detonates the singularity, dealing magic damage to enemies within.

effects.description: The slow lingers for 1 second after leaving the area. Enemies hit by Lucent Singularity's detonation are also slowed by the same amount for 1 second.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Lux sends a lucent singularity to the target location, remaining there for 5 seconds to grant sight of the area and slow nearby enemies.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The initial cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

ultimate.name: Final Spark

effects.context_notes: Active: Lux fires a massive light beam in a line in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and reveals them for 1.

ultimate.description: Active: Lux fires a massive light beam in a line in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and reveals them for 1.5 seconds, as well as grants sight of the surrounding area.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Final Spark grants sight of its surroundings during the cast time and for 0.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
